en.extract:
The Yunnan fulvetta (Alcippe fratercula) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is endemic to southern China, southeastern Myanmar> and northern Indochina.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.
Three subspecies are recognised:

A. f. yunnanensis Harington, HH, 1913 – southern China (southern Sichuan and eastern Yunnan) to northeastern Myanmar (Kachin)
A. f. fratercula Rippon, G, 1900 – central Myanmar to southern China, northern Thailand, and northwestern Laos
A. f. laotiana Delacour, JT, 1926 – north-central and central Laos and north-central Vietnam


References

The '''Yunnan fulvetta''' ('''''Alcippe fratercula''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Leiothrichidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to southern [[China]], southeastern [[Myanmar]]> and northern [[Indochina]].<ref name="Rippon, 1900"/><ref name="Clements Checklist, 2018">{{cite web |url=https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/Clements-Checklist-v2018-August-2018.csv |title=Clements Checklist |website=birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/ |access-date=25 January 2019}}</ref>

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].{{Citation needed|date=January 2019}}

Three [[subspecies]] are recognised:<ref name=avilist>{{ cite web | author=AviList Core Team | date=2025 | title=AviList: The Global Avian Checklist, v2025 | doi=10.2173/avilist.v2025 | doi-access=free | url=http://www.avilist.org/checklist/v2025/ | access-date=23 November 2025 }}</ref>
* ''A. f. yunnanensis'' [[Herbert Hastings Harington|Harington, HH]], 1913 – southern China (southern [[Sichuan]] and eastern [[Yunnan]]) to northeastern Myanmar (Kachin)
* ''A. f. fratercula'' Rippon, G, 1900 – central Myanmar to southern China, northern Thailand, and northwestern Laos
* ''A. f. laotiana'' [[Jean Théodore Delacour|Delacour, JT]], 1926 – north-central and central Laos and north-central Vietnam

zh.extract:
云南雀鹛（学名：Alcippe fratercula），是雀形目雀鹛科的一种鸟类。


特征
云南雀鹛体重约14.8克，翼长约60.9毫米，嘴峰长约12.3毫米，喙宽度约3毫米，喙厚度约3.8毫米，跗蹠长约19.2毫米，尾长约52.4毫米。云南雀鹛是部分迁徙的鸟类，其栖息在密集的高大树木组成的森林中，食性为杂食性，主要食物来源是陆生无脊椎动物。


亚种
A. f. yunnanensis：分布于中国南部（四川南部和云南东部）至缅甸东北部（克钦邦）。
A. f. fratercula：分布于中国南部（云南西南部）至缅甸东南部和印度支那北部。
